payload.title: AI in Urban Planning: A Coastal City Study
payload.summary_short: AI-driven urban planning reduces peak heat by 15%.
payload.summary_detailed: The study analyzes coastal urbanization stressors...
payload.core_thesis: AI-driven urban planning can significantly mitigate urban heat in coastal cities.
payload.methodology: Comparative study of 10 cities using satellite imagery and AI heat mapping.
payload.main_findings: 15% reduction in peak heat using AI-optimized green corridors.
payload.research_gap: Lack of comprehensive data for low-income suburbs.
payload.practical_implication: Recommendation of a hybrid AI-community planning approach.
payload.literature_review_notes: Provides empirical evidence for climate-resilient design.
